initial_req: I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.
I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.

history.question: What types of messages should users be able to send—text only, or also images, files, voice messages, and video? And should the app support both one-on-one and group conversations?
history.answer: Users should be able to send text, images, videos, and files to share various forms of content. As for conversations, yes, the app should support both one-on-one communication (adding friends) and group conversations (creating groups) so users can connect with others in different ways.
